title: data-tw snapshot pack
description: Output of `pack.py --ticker <2330.TW|2330.TWO|2330> --pack snapshot`. Quick overview card data — yfinance info+history, MOPS company_basic + BS + IS for the latest filed quarter, TWSE daily price + PE/PB/yield + margin balance, FinMind T86 三大法人 trailing 90 days. Currency is TWD throughout. Routing: .TW → TWSE listed (sii); .TWO → TPEx listed (otc). pack.py auto-normalizes bare numerics to .TW.

ticker.description: Original yfinance-style ticker after normalization (e.g. '2330.TW' or '2330.TWO').

ticker_code.description: Bare 4-digit (or alphanumeric) TW listing code, no suffix.

market.description: sii = TWSE listed; otc = TPEx listed.

_partial.description: TW-SPECIFIC top-level flag. Flips true when ANY Tier A (mops/twse) leaf carries _error. data-tw never auto-falls-back to Tier 2 — consumers (Layer 2) inspect this flag + per-leaf _error to decide whether to escalate.

info.description: Tier 2. _action='info'. data is the yfinance .info dict.

history.description: Tier 2. _action='history'. data has {ticker, period, interval, data: [{date, open, high, low, close, volume}], latest_close, latest_date, rows}.

mops.description: Tier A — MOPS 公開資訊觀測站. ROC dates: balance_sheet/income_statement use latest_roc_quarter() per pack.py (e.g. 114/4 for Q4 2025 fetched after Apr 1 2026; pre-Apr 1 falls back to prior year Q3).

finmind.description: Tier 2-gap — FinMind. Snapshot only includes T86 daily 三大法人 flow (90-day window) which has no Tier A equivalent.
